description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular digital radio device with a sleek black and metallic finish. The top surface features a prominent mesh speaker grille and a digital display screen that shows red illuminated text, indicating active scanning and station information. The side panels are equipped with several round physical buttons and a headphone jack, suggesting manual control and audio output options. Branding and model information, including 'AZATOM' and 'DAB Radio', are clearly printed on the front and top surfaces. The device appears to be made primarily of plastic with metallic accents and a mesh speaker cover, giving it a modern, durable appearance. Its size and design indicate it is intended for portable use, likely powered by an internal battery.
description: A sleek, portable digital radio with a mesh speaker grille, digital display, and physical control buttons. The device features a black and metallic finish with clear branding and compact design.
description_view_0: Side view showing three round control buttons, a headphone jack, and the digital display with illuminated red text.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the mesh speaker grille, digital display, and prominent branding on the top surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with additional buttons and a clear view of the display and speaker grille.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the headphone jack, control buttons, and the digital display, emphasizing the device's slim profile.
